Bracket.bracketCompleteLine1: Fill in the form on the right and tap
Bracket.bracketCompleteLine2: to save and view your summary.
Bracket.groupStepLockedOtherHint: Use the dots above to jump to groups you still need to finish.

Bracket.hintR32: Pick a winner in all 16 matches to continue.

Registration.consentContestSuffix: and I authorise the processing of my data (name, email and phone) to enter this prize draw, manage my entry, validate my prediction and contact me if I win. Data will not be used for other purposes without a legal basis.
Registration.consentMarketing: I agree to receive commercial messages and proposals from SierraLabs by email. This is optional; I can withdraw consent at any time (for example by replying “unsubscribe” or writing to the support address).
Registration.errorGeneric: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
Registration.footerHint: Complete the bracket, accept the required contest consent and fill in your details to submit.
Registration.scoringBody: 10 points per correct winner, 25 for correct score, and 50 for the exact bracket path.
Registration.title: Register prediction
Registration.trustIntro: Your data are processed for limited, transparent purposes: the prize draw and, if you choose, company updates. We do not sell your data.

Success.anotherHint: A new entry ID will be generated when you submit another prediction.
Success.challengeBody: Tap “Share your result” to copy a message with your public link (many apps show your bracket card as a rich preview) and the link to play the bracket in the app.
Success.subtitle: Your prediction has been registered for the 2026 World Cup Final prize draw.
Success.winnersNote: Winners will be announced on July 20th, 2026 via registered email.

LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy policy
LegalPrivacy.p1: SierraLabs is the controller of the personal data you provide when you register your prediction in Bracket FIFA 26 (a promotional competition linked to the FIFA World Cup 2026). This policy supplements what you accept in the registration form.
LegalPrivacy.p2: Data we process: name, email address and WhatsApp number; your bracket picks linked to an entry ID; submission date and time. Contact data are stored on secure servers and transmitted over HTTPS.
LegalPrivacy.p3: Purposes: (a) run the prize draw and verify your prediction; (b) contact you if you win or for competition-related issues; (c) if you tick the optional box, send commercial communications and proposals from SierraLabs. We do not use automated decisions that produce legal effects for you.
LegalPrivacy.p4: Legal bases: performance of pre-contractual / contractual steps and the competition rules for (a) and (b); your explicit consent for marketing (c). Contest consent is required to participate; marketing consent is voluntary and can be withdrawn.
LegalPrivacy.p5: Retention: we keep competition data as long as needed to run the draw, handle queries and meet legal obligations (typically a few months after the competition ends, unless the law requires longer). Marketing records are kept until you withdraw consent or object.
LegalPrivacy.p6: Recipients: authorised SierraLabs staff and processors (e.g. hosting) under contract and instructions only. We do not sell your data.
LegalPrivacy.p7: Your GDPR rights: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability and objection, and to withdraw consent at any time without affecting prior lawful processing. Contact us via the support page email. You may also lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
LegalPrivacy.p8: Children: this service is not aimed at under-16s. If we learn we hold a child’s data, we will delete it.

LegalRules.title: Tournament and competition rules
LegalRules.p1: Bracket FIFA 26 is a FIFA World Cup 2026 predictor for promotional purposes. Predictions are unofficial and do not affect FIFA or real match outcomes.
LegalRules.p2: You must complete every bracket stage (through third place) and the registration form to enter the associated prize draw.
LegalRules.p3: The scoring rules shown on the registration screen describe how a prediction may be scored against real results when the competition evaluation applies.
LegalRules.p4: SierraLabs may change these rules or competition dates for organisational or legal reasons; we will publish updates on this page when needed.
LegalRules.p5: Entry is free apart from your internet connection. Multiple submissions may be allowed as described in the app; each submission is a separate entry where stated.

LegalSupport.title: Support and contact
LegalSupport.intro: For questions about the competition, privacy or technical issues, email us and include your entry ID if you have already submitted a prediction.
LegalSupport.response: We aim to reply within a reasonable time on business days.
